texts.content_text1: By the end of this module you ...
texts.content_text20: will be able to describe the main modes of transmission and prevention methods of HIV, Hepatitis B and C, and other sexually transmitted infections.
texts.content_text21: will be able to explain the importance of early detection, screening, and treatment of communicable diseases in correctional settings.
texts.content_text22: will be able to identify key risk factors for disease transmission in detention environments, including overcrowding and unsafe practices.
texts.content_text23: will be able to demonstrate basic knowledge of managing chronic conditions such as diabetes and monitoring vital signs like blood pressure.
texts.content_text24: will be able to recognise emergency situations such as cardiac arrest and outline the basic steps of CPR and use of an AED.
